raw:
## Completed
Fixed the reviewer-blocking Tier 1 bug:
- Internal scorer keyword labels no longer count as verifiable evidence.
- Gate-1 rendering now trusts the scorer’s `unsubstantiated` flag instead of re-checking generated reasons.
- Added coverage for keyword-derived risky claims like “The config seems off here.”

## Files Changed
- `extensions/foreman/scorer.ts` - filters evidence inputs so classifier labels don’t launder weak claims.
- `extensions/foreman/planner.ts` - renders unsubstantiated annotation from scorer flag only.
- `extensions/foreman/test/scorer_test.sh` - added keyword-derived unsubstantiated scorer + render tests.
- `.pi/foreman.json` - verify gate includes approval friction test from prior round.
- `extensions/foreman/approvalfriction.ts` - pure Gate-2 friction module from prior round.
- `extensions/foreman/index.ts` - Gate-2 elevated confirm wiring from prior round.
- `extensions/foreman/teampacket.ts` - team packet unsubstantiated surfacing from prior round.
- `extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md` - Tier-2 self-resolve prompt guard from prior round.
- `extensions/foreman/test/approvalfriction_test.sh` - approval friction tests from prior round.
- `extensions/foreman/docs/INTERNALS.md` - internals docs from prior round.

## How To Verify
`grep -q "claude-opus-4-8:xhigh" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/scorer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/approvalfriction_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/teampacket_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/reviewer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/docer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh`

## Notes
Verification passed. Elevated ships are confirmed with: `foreman({ resume: true, approve: true, confirm: "SHIP <slug>" })`.

## MACHINE BLOCK (MANDATORY — end your response with this exact block)
---DEV-JSON---
{
  "summary": "Fixed the reviewer-blocking evidence bug so internal scorer keyword labels no longer count as substantiation; added keyword-cost coverage and kept the full suite green.",
  "filesChanged": [
    ".pi/foreman.json - verify gate includes approvalfriction_test.sh",
    "extensions/foreman/approvalfriction.ts - pure approval friction decider",
    "extensions/foreman/index.ts - elevated Gate 2 confirm enforcement and banner",
    "extensions/foreman/scorer.ts - evidence filtering for unsubstantiated risky claims",
    "extensions/foreman/planner.ts - Gate 1 renders scorer unsubstantiated flag only",
    "extensions/foreman/teampacket.ts - carries unsubstantiated annotation into team packet",
    "extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md - self-resolve guard before risky question raising",
    "extensions/foreman/test/scorer_test.sh - keyword-derived unsubstantiated coverage",
    "extensions/foreman/test/approvalfriction_test.sh - approval friction and grep guard tests",
    "extensions/foreman/docs/INTERNALS.md - documented new internals"
  ],
  "howToVerify": "grep -q \"claude-opus-4-8:xhigh\" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/scorer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/approvalfriction_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/teampacket_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/reviewer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/docer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh"
}
